channel.title: Talented at AI!
channel.description: Recent content on Talented at AI!

item.title: The world of AI - making the most of the opportunity
item.description: Welcome to TalentedAtAI. This is where we review and explain AI tools.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy Last updated: March 29, 2026

Welcome to TalentedAtAI (“we”, “us”, or “our”). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit talentedatai.com (the “Site”). By using the Site you agree to the terms of this policy.

  1. Information we collect We may collect the following types of information:

Usage data: Pages visited, time spent on the Site, browser type, device type, and referring URLs — collected automatically via analytics tools. Cookies: Small files placed on your device by us or third-party services to help operate the Site and understand how it is used. Contact information: If you contact us via email, we collect your name and email address to respond to your enquiry. We do not collect sensitive personal data such as financial information, government ID numbers, or health data.
